Get in Touch

Member of Parliament

E-mail: abena.oppongasare.mp@parliament.uk

For security reasons all post for Abena must be sent directly to the parliamentary address.

Parliamentary address: Abena Oppong-Asare MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA

Telephone

The office phones are operated Monday to Friday, 10 – 12pm and 2 – 4pm.

Casework Queries:

01322 342991

Press & Parliamentary Queries:

0207 219 4892

Social Media

Abena is active on social media and you can visit her page on Facebook and Twitter. It is not possible to respond to individual online comments, tweets or direct private messages so you will need to contact the office in the way set out on this page.

Sign-up to receive Monthly Newsletters

Please sign up below to receive monthly e-newsletters, in which you will find updates on local campaigns, my work in Parliament and events taking place near you.

Subscribe

* indicates required
e-mail updates

Your details will not be shared with any third parties for marketing purposes and you can unsubscribe at any time. For details please read our privacy policy.

Contact Form

You can contact me about your ideas, issues or concerns in a number of ways. In all correspondence you must ensure you provide your full name, address and telephone number, as I can only deal with constituents who reside in Erith and Thamesmead.

Please review our Privacy statement for more information on how your data will be processed.

Contact form:

Here for Erith and Thamesmead

Through my work I am determined to work with local residents, community groups, businesses and public services to ensure that Erith and Thamesmead is put on the map and we get a fair deal for our community.

Get in Touch

E-mail: abena.oppongasare.mp@parliament.uk
Twitter: @abenaopp
Facebook: Abena-Oppong-Asare-MP
